And the models got so large that even a wildly profitable quant fund couldn't fund them alone."]}],["$","p","175",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["The funding round isn't a defeat.
